title: Spiraling Whirlpool
description:
You happen upon a [aqua][sine]Massive Spiraling Whirlpool[/sine][/aqua]. The water swirls with beautiful precision and its surrounding walls are adorned with spiral patterns.

[purple][sine]Around and around... around...
....and around.... what a sight......[/sine][/purple]

What do you do?
conditions: Each player has at least one card enchantable with Spiral in their deck
notes: The [gold]Drink[/gold] option heals [green]33%[/green] of the player's maximum HP (rounded down to an integer). The [gold]Observe[/gold] option prompts the player to select one card from their deck that can receive the [purple]Spiral[/purple] enchantment — currently Strike and Defend cards qualify.
